# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI-Assisted DSA Practice with Real-Time Guidance
- Summary: Highlight the AI-assisted problem-solving guidance and real-time code execution in CodeGrind's DSA practice flow, showcasing problem-solving with an Azure OpenAI-backed assistant and live evaluation.
- Slug: codegrind-dsa-practice-new-ai-assisted-demo
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsa-practice-new-ai-assisted-demo
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-21-codegrind-dsa-practice-new-ai-assisted-demo.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with an AI assistant and real-time Judge0 execution to guide you from problem description to working solution, all inside a competitive, gamified learning space.
- CTA: Try a challenge with AI help now on CodeGrind
- Visual brief: A short 15–20 second motion clip showing a developer typing in CodeGrind’s editor, AI assistant responses appearing as chat bubbles, and live code results validating a solution with a green success indicator. Include subtle cyberpunk UI cues and CodeGrind branding.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
